title: AZ-900 Mock Exam 2: Applied Azure Scenarios
description: A 50-question unofficial mock paper aligned to the AZ-900 skills measured from July 20, 2026. Covers cloud concepts, Azure architecture and services, and management and governance. Includes detailed explanations and official Microsoft Learn references. Original practice content; not official exam questions.

items.prompt: An online retailer automatically adds compute instances during a sale and removes them afterward. Which cloud characteristic is demonstrated?
items.explanation: “Elasticity” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: Which statement best defines cloud computing?
items.answer: Delivery of computing services over the internet
options: Delivery of computing services over the internet
Purchase of software only on physical media
Operation of all servers by end users
A network that can contain only virtual machines
items.explanation: “Delivery of computing services over the internet” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: A company retains a private cloud for regulated systems and uses Azure for customer-facing services. Which cloud model does the full environment represent?
items.explanation: “Hybrid cloud” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: In a SaaS solution, which responsibility normally remains with the customer?
items.answer: Managing its data and user access
options: Managing its data and user access
items.explanation: “Managing its data and user access” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: Which TWO statements describe a consumption-based cloud model?
answers: Costs can vary with resource usage
Resources can be released when no longer required
options: Costs can vary with resource usage
Resources can be released when no longer required
All capacity must be purchased years in advance
Unused physical servers remain a customer capital asset
items.explanation: “Costs can vary with resource usage” and “Resources can be released when no longer required” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud models, consumption pricing, serverless operation, and the shared responsibility model determine who manages each layer and how the service is consumed.

items.prompt: A web service increases and decreases capacity automatically as requests change. Which cloud benefit is demonstrated?
items.explanation: “Elasticity” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: A business wants consistent estimates of performance and cost before deployment. Which cloud benefit is most relevant?
items.explanation: “Predictability” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: Central policies enforce allowed regions across hundreds of subscriptions. Which cloud benefit is demonstrated?
items.explanation: “Governance” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: Administrators manage resources from a web portal, command line, or API. Which cloud benefit does this illustrate?
items.explanation: “Manageability” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Cloud benefits distinguish availability, scalability, elasticity, reliability, predictability, governance, security, and manageability.

references.title: Describe the benefits of using cloud services

items.prompt: A company replaces an on-premises CRM system with a complete subscription application. Which cloud service type is being adopted?
items.explanation: “Software as a service (SaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: A database development team wants built-in backups and patching but must control schemas and data. Which service type is most appropriate?
items.explanation: “Platform as a service (PaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: An administrator installs a custom network appliance on an Azure virtual machine. Which service type does the virtual machine represent?
items.explanation: “Infrastructure as a service (IaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: In which service type does the provider manage the application, runtime, operating system, and infrastructure?
items.explanation: “Software as a service (SaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: A team wants to focus on application code while the provider manages middleware and operating systems. Which model should it choose?
items.explanation: “Platform as a service (PaaS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. IaaS provides the most customer control, PaaS manages the application platform, and SaaS delivers a complete provider-managed application.

items.prompt: A company needs separate billing boundaries for its development and production organizations. Which Azure construct should it use?
items.explanation: “Separate subscriptions” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: Policies must be assigned across several Azure subscriptions. At which scope can the subscriptions be organized?
items.explanation: “A management group” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: Which hierarchy is ordered from broadest scope to narrowest scope?
items.answer: Management group, subscription, resource group, resource
options: Management group, subscription, resource group, resource
Subscription, management group, resource, resource group
Resource group, management group, subscription, resource
Resource, resource group, management group, subscription
items.explanation: “Management group, subscription, resource group, resource” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: Which TWO statements describe availability zones?
answers: They are separate physical locations within an Azure region
They provide independent power, cooling, and networking
options: They are separate physical locations within an Azure region
They provide independent power, cooling, and networking
They are billing containers above management groups
They guarantee that all Azure regions contain exactly three zones
items.explanation: “They are separate physical locations within an Azure region” and “They provide independent power, cooling, and networking” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure regions and availability zones describe physical resiliency, while management groups, subscriptions, resource groups, and resources form the governance hierarchy.

items.prompt: A company requires a private dedicated connection from its on-premises network to Azure that does not traverse the public internet. Which service should it use?
options: Azure VPN Gateway over the internet
items.explanation: “Azure ExpressRoute” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: A workload packages its application and dependencies into a portable image but does not require a full guest operating system per instance. Which compute type fits?
items.explanation: “Containers” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: Remote employees need cloud-hosted Windows desktops and applications. Which service should be used?
items.explanation: “Azure Virtual Desktop” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: Which Azure service resolves domain names to IP addresses?
items.explanation: “Azure DNS” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: A storage account must be reached through a private IP address in a virtual network. Which networking feature is required?
items.explanation: “A private endpoint” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. The correct Azure compute or networking service follows from the required management model, connectivity, scaling, and exposure of the workload.

references.title: Describe Azure compute and networking services

items.prompt: A company needs to copy many files to and from Azure Storage from a command line. Which tool should it use?
items.explanation: “AzCopy” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Users need a graphical tool to manage blobs, files, queues, and tables. Which tool should they use?
items.explanation: “Azure Storage Explorer” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: An on-premises Windows file server should cache an Azure file share and synchronize changes. Which service supports this?
items.explanation: “Azure File Sync” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: A company must transfer hundreds of terabytes to Azure where network bandwidth is insufficient. Which option is most appropriate?
items.explanation: “Azure Data Box” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: Data must be replicated synchronously across zones and asynchronously to a secondary region. Which option provides this?
items.explanation: “Geo-zone-redundant storage (GZRS)” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure storage choices depend on the data shape, access pattern, durability requirement, access tier, and transfer method.

items.prompt: A company wants to invite a partner’s identity to access selected applications. Which Microsoft Entra capability supports this?
items.explanation: “External identities” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Access should be allowed only from compliant devices and require MFA for risky sign-ins. Which feature should be configured?
items.explanation: “Microsoft Entra Conditional Access” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: A company needs managed domain join, LDAP, and Kerberos for legacy applications without deploying domain controllers. Which service should it use?
items.explanation: “Microsoft Entra Domain Services” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Which security model uses multiple protective layers so another layer remains if one control fails?
items.explanation: “Defense in depth” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: Which TWO capabilities are provided by Microsoft Defender for Cloud?
items.explanation: “Security posture recommendations” and “Workload threat protection” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Microsoft Entra capabilities establish identity and access, Azure RBAC controls resource authorization, and layered security services reduce risk.

references.title: Describe Azure identity, access, and security

items.prompt: A team wants notification when forecast spending approaches a monthly limit. What should it create?
items.answer: A budget with alerts in Cost Management
options: A budget with alerts in Cost Management
items.explanation: “A budget with alerts in Cost Management” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: A stable virtual machine workload will run continuously for several years. Which purchasing option may reduce compute cost?
items.explanation: “A reservation” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: Which network activity commonly adds to an Azure bill?
options: Inbound data transfer in all cases
Viewing a resource in the portal
items.explanation: “Outbound data transfer from Azure” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: Development virtual machines are unused overnight. Which action can reduce their compute charges?
items.answer: Stop and deallocate them when not needed
options: Stop and deallocate them when not needed
Move them to another resource group
items.explanation: “Stop and deallocate them when not needed” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure pricing and Cost Management tools estimate, allocate, monitor, and optimize spending; tags add useful business metadata but do not enforce access.

items.prompt: A policy should automatically audit whether storage accounts require secure transfer. Which service should be assigned?
items.explanation: “Azure Policy” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: Administrators should be able to read a critical resource but not modify it. Which feature should be applied?
items.explanation: “A read-only lock” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: Which service helps an organization understand where sensitive data exists and how it is used?
items.explanation: “Microsoft Purview” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: Where can an Azure Policy assignment be scoped?
items.answer: At a management group, subscription, or resource group
options: At a management group, subscription, or resource group
items.explanation: “At a management group, subscription, or resource group” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure Policy evaluates resource compliance, locks prevent accidental changes, and Microsoft Purview supports data governance and discovery.

references.title: Describe Azure governance and compliance tools

items.prompt: A company wants to manage servers running on-premises and in other clouds through Azure. Which service should it use?
items.explanation: “Azure Arc” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: A Linux-focused administrator wants to automate Azure with cross-platform command syntax. Which tool is appropriate?
items.explanation: “Azure CLI” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: An administrator prefers PowerShell cmdlets and object-based pipelines. Which Azure management tool should be used?
items.explanation: “Azure PowerShell” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: What format do traditional ARM templates use?
items.explanation: “JSON” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: Which TWO tools can issue commands to Azure Resource Manager from Azure Cloud Shell?
items.explanation: “Azure CLI” and “Azure PowerShell” are the required choices because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Azure management tools provide portal, shell, hybrid, and infrastructure-as-code approaches through a consistent Resource Manager control plane.

references.title: Describe tools for managing and deploying Azure resources

items.prompt: Operations staff want an email when CPU usage exceeds a threshold. Which capability should they configure?
items.explanation: “An Azure Monitor alert” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: A team needs to query collected log data using Kusto Query Language. Which Azure Monitor capability should it use?
items.explanation: “Log Analytics” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: Which service shows planned maintenance and health advisories that are relevant to an organization’s subscriptions?
options: The public Azure status page only
items.explanation: “Azure Service Health” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.

items.prompt: Which tool reports recommendations but does not automatically implement every suggested change?
items.explanation: “Azure Advisor” is the best answer because it directly matches the requirement in the scenario. Advisor recommends improvements, Service Health reports Azure service impact, and Azure Monitor collects and acts on platform and application telemetry.
